title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・いつもの二人

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Hey... how did I... do?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Am I... number one?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Scaaarlet!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible race! I'm not forgetting this
one anytime soon!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
That sure was something! The best race I've ever
seen—no doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. How about that?! I won!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm number one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The energy drains out of Daiwa Scarlet, as though
her tightly wound nerves have finally relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Aaah... I feel alive again!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but you look about ready to pass
out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Vodka?! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Don't get your socks in a twist. I'm... I'm here to
say congrats.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing. You've gotten so strong, and...
You really were the number one Umamusume out
there today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So I... Uh... I guess what I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I think I finally get what you mean when you talk
about being number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh? Took you long enough.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! Why do you gotta talk down to—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know, I only realized it myself after this race
was over.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Crossing the finish line, hearing the cheers, seeing
the expressions on every face in the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I thought to myself, "I've done it. I'm their number
one." But that's when it came to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When I say I want to be number one, what I really
mean is... I want to be the Umamusume that lives
on in their memories.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When they hear the words "autumn Tenno Sho," I
want them to remember the time they saw me
race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And when they think about Umamusume, I want
the first name that pops into their heads to be
"Daiwa Scarlet."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y'know, that doesn't sound half bad.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...But I'll still get you next time! The next race is
gonna be mine for sure!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. Go on, hurry back overseas. You've
still got that warrior's pilgrimage of yours or
whatever, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You better work your butt off if you want any
hope of beating me. Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I break up the budding argument, we make
our way back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right then, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, what else do I need to do to become
number one?
choice_data_list:
Show that you're everyone's number one in the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Correct! Hehe, you do know your stuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then it's time for me to become the number one
Umamusume, just like we always planned!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise Daiwa Scarlet that I'll bring her victory
in the Arima Kinen.
